heading: Sunday Night
text: Showers becoming more scattered, turning over to snow. Colder. Lows in the low to mid 30s, a few 20s possible in the northeast. West wind at 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph.

heading: Monday
text: A chance of a few snow showers over the northern hills in the morning with mostly cloudy skies. Highs from the low to mid 40s, a few 30s sticking around in the northeast. West wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: A chance of isolated snow showers over the central greens early. Lows through the 20s.
